outreach_toolkits.title: Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) Deployment Toolkit
outreach_toolkits.description: Resources to help communities and agencies communicate the benefits of V2X technology to local stakeholders and the public.

outreach_toolkits.title: Artificial Intelligence in Transportation Toolkit
outreach_toolkits.description: Shareable materials explaining how AI is being used to improve safety and efficiency across the transportation system.

outreach_toolkits.title: Intersection Safety Challenge Outreach Toolkit
outreach_toolkits.description: Materials for local agencies and community partners to raise awareness about ITS-enabled intersection safety technologies.

outreach_toolkits.title: Automation Program Stakeholder Toolkit
outreach_toolkits.description: Resources for stakeholders engaged in automated vehicle research, policy, and deployment conversations.

outreach_toolkits.title: ITS4US Complete Trip Program Toolkit
outreach_toolkits.description: Community-facing materials to share the story of ITS4US deployments improving mobility for underserved populations.

outreach_toolkits.title: ITS for Freight & Commercial Vehicles Toolkit
outreach_toolkits.description: Resources for freight industry stakeholders, port operators, and fleet managers on ITS technologies for commercial transportation.
